_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Luvit Generic
author: eggs@pashka.host
description: A generic Luvit egg with native Git support. Clones or pulls a repo on every start, installs Lit packages, and runs the application. Compatible with the Discordia Lua framework.
startup: if [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "1" ]; then GIT_ADDR="${GIT_ADDRESS}"; if [[ "${GIT_ADDR}" != *.git ]]; then GIT_ADDR="${GIT_ADDR}.git"; fi; USERNAME_NORM="${USERNAME:-git}"; REPO_URL="https://${USERNAME_NORM}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@${GIT_ADDR}"; BRANCH="${BRANCH:-main}"; if [ ! -d .git ] || [ ! -f .git/config ]; then echo "Cloning repo..."; rm -rf * .git && git clone --branch "$BRANCH" "$REPO_URL" .; else echo "Pulling latest from $BRANCH..."; git fetch origin "$BRANCH" && git reset --hard FETCH_HEAD; fi; fi; if [ ! -z "${LIT_PACKAGES}" ]; then ./lit install ${LIT_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ ! -z "${PRE_START_CMD}" ]; then echo "Running pre-start command..."; eval "${PRE_START_CMD}"; fi; ./luvit /home/container/${LUA_FILE} ${APP_ARGS}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Luvit Generic — Installation Script
# Support: eggs@pashka.host

apt update -y
apt install -y git curl jq file unzip

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

## Install Luvit and Lit
echo "Installing Luvit..."
curl -L https://github.com/luvit/lit/raw/master/get-lit.sh | sh
echo "Luvit installed."

if [ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
    echo "No git repo set — skipping clone."
    exit 0
fi

if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

USERNAME_NORM="${USERNAME:-git}"

if [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo "Using anonymous clone."
else
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME_NORM}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

BRANCH="${BRANCH:-main}"

if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server | grep -v luvit | grep -v lit)" ]; then
    if [ -d .git ] && [ -f .git/config ]; then
        ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
        if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
            echo "Pulling latest from ${BRANCH}..."
            git pull origin ${BRANCH}
        else
            echo "Different repo detected — skipping pull."
        fi
    else
        echo "Files found with no git config — skipping to avoid data loss."
        exit 10
    fi
else
    echo "Cloning ${GIT_ADDRESS} (branch: ${BRANCH})..."
    git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
fi

if [ ! -z "${LIT_PACKAGES}" ]; then
    echo "Installing Lit packages..."
    ./lit install ${LIT_PACKAGES}
fi

echo "Installation complete."
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: Full HTTPS URL of the Git repository to clone.

variables.name: Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone and pull from on each start.

variables.name: Git Username
variables.description: Username for authenticating with a private repository.

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Personal access token for authenticating with a private repository.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pulls the latest changes from the repository on every startup.

variables.name: Lua File
variables.description: Entry point Lua file to run.

variables.name: Lit Packages
variables.description: Lit packages to install at startup, space-separated. Example: SinisterRectus/discordia

variables.name: App Arguments
variables.description: Arguments passed to the application at runtime.

variables.name: Pre-Start Command
variables.description: Shell command to run after pulling but before the app starts.
